deploy.startCommand: /bin/bash -c "echo 'ServerName 0.0.0.0' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf && echo 'DirectoryIndex index.php index.html' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf && echo 'upload_max_filesize = 50M' >> /usr/local/etc/php/php.ini && echo 'post_max_size = 50M' >> /usr/local/etc/php/php.ini && docker-entrypoint.sh a2dismod mpm_event && a2dismod mpm_worker && a2enmod mpm_prefork && apache2-foreground"
